speaker: seller

args.message: Thank you for your interest in the 2017 Nissan Altima SV. This vehicle has a clean title and is ready for a new owner. We've priced it very competitively at $11,495. Would you like to know more about its features or perhaps take it for a test drive?

text: Thank you for your interest in the 2017 Nissan Altima SV. This vehicle has a clean title and is ready for a new owner. We've priced it very competitively at $11,495. Would you like to know more about its features or perhaps take it for a test drive?

speaker: buyer

args.message: Could you please provide more details about the vehicle's maintenance history and any recent repairs? My client is particularly interested in ensuring the car has been well-cared for.

text: Could you please provide more details about the vehicle's maintenance history and any recent repairs? My client is particularly interested in ensuring the car has been well-cared for.

speaker: seller

args.message: This 2017 Nissan Altima SV has been diligently maintained. While we don't have records of specific recent repairs, it's important to note that this vehicle was part of a rental fleet for its first 38 months, which typically involves consistent upkeep during that period. We also want to be upfront about a slight oil seep visible at the valve cover gasket, which consumes about 1 quart every 2500 miles. The CVT transmission may exhibit some shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, which can be typical for this type of unit at this mileage. We believe in full transparency and encourage you to have your client perform any inspections they deem necessary.
